_metadata.name: SIE Genesis Seed
_metadata.description: Axiomatic genesis definitions for the Systemic Intelligence Engine. Contains the SIE system definition with all norm appraisal checkpoints modeled as PPRC chains, governance mechanisms, and supporting primitives. These seeds are owned by the SIE system definition and are immutable to tenant definitions.
_metadata.immutabilityPolicy: Owned by SIE system definition. Tenant definitions MUST NOT modify, override, or delete genesis seed primitives. Seed ownership is enforced by the Definition Manager via system-level access control.
_metadata.uuidScheme: Deterministic UUIDs in 00000000-0000-0000-XXXX-YYYYYYYYYYYY range. XXXX = primitive category code, YYYYYYYYYYYY = sequence number within category.
